提示：当前 Prompt 长度已超过模型推荐限制（最大: Tip: Current Prompt length exceeds the model's recommended limit (max
负向提示词，例如：低清晰度、畸形、文字水印: Negative prompt, e.g. low quality, deformed, text watermark
仅在火山方舟、阿里百炼和 OpenAI 兼容渠道等支持图生图的模型下生效。: Only effective for models supporting image-to-image, such as Volcengine Ark, Bailian, and OpenAI-compatible channels.
该厂商暂未配置专属参数，可使用通用参数和高级 JSON。: No vendor-specific parameters configured for this provider; use general parameters and advanced JSON.
高级参数会最后合并，可覆盖表单参数: Advanced parameters are merged last and can override form parameters
未选择时使用默认 image Profile: Use default image Profile when not selected
阿里百炼当前按显式尺寸/固定比例使用，未开放自动比例。: Bailian currently uses explicit size/fixed ratio; auto ratio is not available.
火山 Seedream 4.x 至少需要 3686400 像素，仅可使用高分辨率: Volcengine Seedream 4.x requires at least 3686400 pixels; only high-resolution sizes are supported.
当前渠道建议使用显式尺寸，若需特殊比例请结合模型文档确认。: The current channel recommends explicit sizes; if special ratios are needed, please refer to the model documentation.
Seedream 4.x 图片尺寸要求较高；后端会继续做最终校验。: Seedream 4.x image size requirements are strict; the backend will perform final validation.
支持配置 OpenAI 专属的生图品质 quality、风格 style 以及: Supports OpenAI-specific image generation quality, style, and thinking parameters.
支持百度智能云千帆大模型 V2 生图参数适配，包含 ERNIE iRAG 检索增: Supports Baidu Qianfan large model V2 image generation parameter adaptation, including ERNIE iRAG retrieval-augmented anti-overflow mechanism.
已接入谷歌 Gemini 原生 generateContent 生图，自动兼容处: Integrated with Google Gemini native generateContent image generation; reference images handled automatically.
调用成功，但未解析到图片: Call succeeded, but no image parsed
搜索场景、状态、Request ID、错误: Search scenario, status, Request ID, error
能力字段是模型元信息，未实现接口仍会返回 501。: The capability field is model metadata; unimplemented APIs still return 501.
图片模型常用参数会合并到 options: Common parameters of image models are merged into options
图片配置会调用统一生图接口，结果可直接预览。: Image config calls the unified image generation API; results can be previewed directly.
留空则不修改已保存密钥: Leave blank to keep saved key unchanged
